comment: GT_DIRECTIVE_026R closure: in-process sample using run_entry_reasoning_pipeline_v1 + merge_runtime_fault_nodes_v1 (non-LLM / stub-equivalent path). student_output attachment: field student_reasoning_fault_map_v1 is duplicated here as student_output_student_reasoning_fault_map_v1 for review. Debug API contract (same payload the /debug/learning-loop page loads): automated test test_debug_learning_loop_trace_includes_fault_map_from_runtime_event_v1 in test_gt_directive_026r_student_reasoning_fault_map_v1.py — last learning_trace event with stage student_reasoning_fault_map_v1 appears as top-level student_reasoning_fault_map_v1. Optional live lab: on a host that reaches the stack, GET /api/debug/learning-loop/trace/<job_id> for a post-deploy Student job and confirm the same key; save redacted JSON beside this file if you need a network-captured artifact.

nodes_v1.operator_message_v1: Market data for the decision time is present in the packet.

nodes_v1.output_summary_v1: Trend, momentum, and range context are computed from those bars only.
nodes_v1.operator_message_v1: Indicators were derived from the packet; nothing was invented beyond the data shown.

nodes_v1.input_summary_v1: 0 memory row(s) available to the score.
nodes_v1.operator_message_v1: Prior lesson rows were read and folded into the memory score for this step.

nodes_v1.output_summary_v1: Win rate and loss streak influence applied.
nodes_v1.operator_message_v1: How similar past outcomes behaved nudges confidence up or down.

nodes_v1.input_summary_v1: Price, range, and chosen direction hint.
nodes_v1.output_summary_v1: Invalidation, stop, and target lines are all described when a trade is live.
nodes_v1.operator_message_v1: Reward versus risk is written in concrete terms whenever the engine contemplates a live entry; otherwise the side stays flat.
The path combined those inputs into a single go / no-go style choice.
The record is well-formed and can move on to the model and seal steps.
This run used the rule-based student path, not a live model call.

nodes_v1.output_summary_v1: Sealed student output is ready to store.
nodes_v1.operator_message_v1: The student line was merged with the engine and is ready to store.
A formal execution handoff was built from the sealed student line.
